description_long: This airplane features a compact fuselage with a pair of straight, mid-mounted wings extending laterally, each ending in a rounded tip. The wings and arms are segmented, giving a modular, almost robotic appearance, and the hands are detailed with articulated fingers. The main body is robust and blocky, with two large, squared engine nacelles or landing gear housings positioned at the rear. The tail section is minimal, lacking a prominent vertical stabilizer, and the nose is rounded and slightly tapered. The surface texture is mottled gray, suggesting a metallic or composite material, and the overall design is stylized rather than strictly realistic.
description: A stylized airplane with straight, mid-mounted wings, articulated hands, and a blocky fuselage with large rear housings. The surface is mottled gray, giving it a metallic or composite look.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, articulated hands, and the blocky rear housings clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wings, the rounded nose, and the segmented arm structure.
description_view_2: Bottom view displaying the underside of the wings, the squared rear housings, and the articulated fingers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the modular segments and the rear structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings and rounded tips, no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin engine nacelles integrated at the rear, engine type not visually specified.
attribute_tail_design: Minimal tail section with no prominent vertical stabilizer, unconventional design.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear present in the images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted cockpit, enclosed, with no visible canopy or window details.
